title: Sintel Trailer
summary: The trailer effectively builds emotional engagement through its visual storytelling. Strong occipital and temporal activation indicates high visual processing and narrative comprehension. Peak engagement aligns with key dramatic moments.

keyMoments.label: Character introduction
keyMoments.insight: Temporal lobe activation shows strong social cognition

keyMoments.label: Action sequence
keyMoments.insight: Peak frontal + occipital activation — high arousal achieved

brainInsights: Sustained occipital activation throughout indicates strong visual engagement with animation quality
Temporal lobe peaks during dialog scenes — narrative is being processed and understood
Frontal lobe spikes at 0:38 suggest decision-making engagement during action scenes
Insular activation during character distress scenes indicates emotional resonance
recommendations: The opening 5 seconds could be more visually impactful to capture attention faster
Consider adding a stronger audio cue before the action sequence to prime engagement
The emotional arc successfully builds — maintain this pacing structure
Product/brand integration point would be most effective at the 0:38 peak engagement moment
